title: Engineering Growth Map
introduction: A structured view of the technical domains I work across and the capabilities I build within each.

domains.title: Core Engineering Foundations
domains.purpose: Understanding how systems work under the hood.

topics.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
topics.hint: Efficient data organization and computational problem-solving.

topics.title: Operating Systems
topics.hint: Process management, memory allocation, and system-level interfaces.

topics.title: Networking Basics
topics.hint: Protocols, request lifecycles, and data transport fundamentals.

topics.title: System Design Fundamentals
topics.hint: Architectural patterns for scalable, maintainable systems.

topics.title: REST & API Design
topics.hint: Resource modeling, versioning, and contract-driven interfaces.

topics.title: Authentication & Authorization
topics.hint: Token-based identity verification and role-based access control.

topics.title: Databases (SQL & NoSQL)
topics.hint: Relational and document-based data persistence strategies.

topics.title: Scalability & Caching
topics.hint: Horizontal scaling, cache invalidation, and load distribution.

topics.title: Message Queues & Async Processing
topics.hint: Event-driven architecture and background task execution.

topics.title: Modern Frontend Architectures
topics.hint: Component-based rendering, SSR, and hydration strategies.

topics.title: State Management
topics.hint: Predictable data flow across complex component hierarchies.

topics.title: Accessibility & Performance
topics.hint: WCAG compliance, core web vitals, and perceived speed.

topics.title: Design Systems
topics.hint: Reusable component libraries with consistent visual language.

domains.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
domains.purpose: Shipping and maintaining software in production.

topics.title: Docker & Containers
topics.hint: Application isolation and reproducible runtime environments.

topics.title: CI/CD Pipelines
topics.hint: Automated testing, building, and deployment workflows.

topics.title: Cloud Fundamentals
topics.hint: Compute, storage, and networking across cloud providers.

topics.title: Monitoring & Logging
topics.hint: Observability, alerting, and production diagnostics.

domains.title: Security & Reliability
domains.purpose: Building systems that can be trusted.

topics.title: Secure API Design
topics.hint: Input sanitization, rate limiting, and defense-in-depth patterns.

topics.title: Input Validation
topics.hint: Schema-based verification at system boundaries.

topics.title: Role-Based Access Control
topics.hint: Granular permission models for multi-tenant systems.

topics.title: Error Handling & Resilience
topics.hint: Graceful degradation and fault-tolerant system behavior.

topics.title: AI Integration in Web Apps
topics.hint: Embedding model inference into production request flows.

topics.title: Chatbots & Assistants
topics.hint: Conversational interfaces with context-aware responses.

topics.title: Computer Vision
topics.hint: Image classification, detection, and visual data processing.

topics.title: Automation Pipelines
topics.hint: Orchestrated workflows with intelligent decision points.

topics.title: Code Reviews & Collaboration
topics.hint: Constructive feedback loops and shared code ownership.

topics.title: Documentation & ADRs
topics.hint: Technical specs, architecture decisions, and knowledge transfer.

topics.title: Open Source Contribution
topics.hint: Participating in and maintaining community-driven projects.

topics.title: Technical Communication
topics.hint: Translating complex concepts for diverse audiences.
